email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Performance marketeer bij Office Roeselare. Uw focus op meetbare resultaten en campagnes van A tot Z sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

Bij Episto beheer ik Google Ads, Google Analytics en Search Console voor klantwebsites, en optimaliseer ik campagnes op basis van data. Ik heb ervaring met het opzetten van tracking via Google Tag Manager en Meta Pixel, en ik rapporteer resultaten in duidelijke dashboards. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren.

Ik werk graag in een jong en ambitieus team waar ik verantwoordelijkheid kan nemen en strategisch kan meedenken. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling helpt mij om snel nieuwe tools eigen te maken.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren).

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Performance Marketeer position at Office Roeselare. Your focus on measurable results and end-to-end campaign management aligns perfectly with my experience.

At Episto, I manage Google Ads, Google Analytics, and Search Console for client websites, and optimize campaigns based on data. I have experience setting up tracking via Google Tag Manager and Meta Pixel, and I report results in clear dashboards. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility in AI search engines.

I enjoy working in a young, ambitious team where I can take responsibility and contribute strategically. My technical background in web development helps me quickly master new tools.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons to improve).

I would be happy to discuss my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Toen ik de vacature voor Performance marketeer bij Office Roeselare zag, voelde ik meteen dat dit de volgende stap in mijn carrière is. U zoekt iemand die campagnes van A tot Z beheert, tracking correct instelt en resultaten vertaalt naar concrete acties – precies waar ik dagelijks mee bezig ben.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor de volledige cyclus van advertentiecampagnes: van opzetten in Google Ads en Meta Ads tot het monitoren van prestaties via Google Analytics en Search Console. Ik optimaliseer budgetten op basis van data en stel tracking in met Google Tag Manager en Meta Pixel. Daarnaast bouw ik duidelijke rapportages voor klanten, zodat zij inzicht krijgen in de impact van onze inspanningen.

Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling (AngularJS, JavaScript) en WordPress (Elementor, Astra) geeft mij een voorsprong bij het begrijpen van technische aspecten zoals conversieoptimalisatie en tagging. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com heb ik gestructureerde data (JSON-LD) en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren – een vaardigheid die steeds relevanter wordt in performance marketing.

Ik werk gestructureerd, ben leergierig en volg de nieuwste ontwikkelingen in online marketing en AI op de voet. Uw aanbod van flexibele werkuren, opleidingsmogelijkheden en een jong team spreekt mij zeer aan.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren).

Graag kom ik langs om mijn motivatie en ervaring verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

When I saw the vacancy for Performance Marketeer at Office Roeselare, I immediately felt this is the next step in my career. You are looking for someone who manages campaigns end-to-end, sets up tracking correctly, and translates results into concrete actions – exactly what I do daily.

At Episto, I am responsible for the full cycle of advertising campaigns: from setting up in Google Ads and Meta Ads to monitoring performance via Google Analytics and Search Console. I optimize budgets based on data and set up tracking with Google Tag Manager and Meta Pixel. I also build clear reports for clients, giving them insight into the impact of our efforts.

My technical background in web development (AngularJS, JavaScript) and WordPress (Elementor, Astra) gives me an edge in understanding technical aspects like conversion optimization and tagging. On my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data (JSON-LD) and GEO techniques to improve visibility in AI search engines – a skill increasingly relevant in performance marketing.

I work in a structured way, am eager to learn, and closely follow the latest developments in online marketing and AI. Your offer of flexible hours, training opportunities, and a young team appeals to me greatly.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons to improve).

I would be happy to visit and further explain my motivation and experience.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in performance marketing: managing Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads campaigns, setting up tracking via Google Tag Manager and Meta Pixel, and analyzing results in Google Analytics. At Episto, I run full-cycle campaign management from setup to reporting, optimizing budgets and translating data into actionable improvements. On my own project (mirook.com) I applied structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable with content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Performance marketing: Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, campaign setup & optimization, budget management
- Tracking & analytics: Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- Reporting: building clear client dashboards and reports, translating data into concrete actions
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads campaigns from setup to optimization, including budget allocation and performance tracking
- Set up and maintain tracking via Google Tag Manager and Meta Pixel, ensuring accurate conversion measurement
- Analyze campaign results using Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and SEMrush, translating data into actionable improvements
- Build clear performance reports for clients, highlighting key metrics and optimization opportunities
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
